My Projects

Premium E-Commerce Platform

Real-Time Task Manager

A collaborative Kanban-style board where teams create, assign, and track tasks dynamically. Features drag-and-drop columns, real-time sync, and member presence indicators.

Frontend

Modern Developer Portfolio

A lightning-fast, highly optimized creative portfolio with glassmorphism UI, animated hero section, filterable project grid, and blog with modal reader.

Frontend

AI Chat Interface UI

A clean and intuitive UI designed for seamless interaction with AI language models. Supports dark mode, message history, streaming responses, and code syntax highlighting.

GitHubLive Demo
Backend

RESTful Blog API

A fully documented RESTful API for a multi-author blogging platform. Includes JWT authentication, role-based access control, pagination, and full CRUD for posts and comments.

GitHubLive Demo
Frontend

Weather Dashboard App

A visually rich weather dashboard that displays current conditions, 7-day forecasts, humidity, wind speed, and UV index using the OpenWeatherMap API with animated icons.

Job Board Platform

A full-stack job listing platform where companies post vacancies and candidates apply. Features a rich text editor for job descriptions, applicant tracking, and email alerts.

An analytics dashboard aggregating metrics from multiple social platforms. Charts follower growth, engagement rates, and top-performing content using interactive visualizations.

Recipe Finder App

Search and discover thousands of recipes by ingredient, cuisine, or dietary restriction. Save favorites to a personal cookbook and generate dynamic shopping lists.

A full-stack URL shortening service with custom aliases, click analytics, expiry dates, and a dashboard to manage all your shortened links with QR code export.

Online Quiz Platform

A timed, gamified quiz platform supporting multiple question types—MCQ, true/false, and short answer. Tracks scores, shows leaderboards, and sends result certificates via email.
